title: Allegiance Timeline
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS joins FROM PowerplayJoin WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) AS defections FROM PowerplayDefect WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate

details.text: {joins} Power pledge(s) made during the report period. Switching Powers is a high-drama event in Powerplay circles — a defection entry in your log is the equivalent of a political scandal, and the pattern of joins and leaves reveals how stable or mercurial your loyalties have been.
details.help: PowerplayJoin fires when joining a Power; PowerplayDefect when switching while pledged. joins drives the title as the active loyalty action count.

tagLines: Powerplay allegiance change events compiled. Political loyalty record updated in the Pilots Federation database.
Every defection is a story. Something changed — the Power, the galaxy, or you. The timestamp marks the moment.
Some commanders pledge once and never look back. This record shows which type you are.
